levelName: Level 64: While Loops - Reverse a Number
puzzleDescription: Learn how to flip a number using a while loop. For example, 123 becomes 321.
objective: Input an integer and print its digits in reverse order using a while loop.
hints: Use 'num % 10' to get the last digit of the number.
Use 'num / 10' to remove the last digit from the number.
Use 'System.out.print()' instead of 'println()' to keep the digits on the same line.
